findings.message: mod.ts wildcard re-exports internal layer ./adapters/mod.ts — curate via src/public/mod.ts instead
forbidden folder name 'helpers' — split into domain/, application/, or adapters/ aligned to a real concern
file is 601 lines (cap 500) — split into smaller single-reason files
file is 716 lines (cap 500) — split into smaller single-reason files
file is 848 lines (cap 500) — split into smaller single-reason files
directory has 17 immediate children; doctrine cap is 12
docs/architecture.md missing — required when public symbols > 25
package implements durable workflow concepts — verify state machine model is documented in docs/architecture.md
Deno.exit/process.exit outside bin/ — crash boundaries must be explicit, throw a typed error instead
`any` in exported declaration — use `unknown` or a specific type
